item.title: Trump appears ready to attack Iran as U.S. strike force takes shape
item.description: Although the United States and ally Israel have a military advantage over Iranian forces, there are ways for Tehran to make any attack painful, offici...

item.title: The Epstein files have brought a wave of resignations and investigations
item.description: A number of prominent figures have stepped down or are facing investigations after their communications with Jeffrey Epstein and his former longtime c...

item.title: Virginia’s Spanberger to deliver Democratic response to State of the Union
item.description: U.S. House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries (D-New York) said Thursday that Virginia Gov. Abigail Spanberger will deliver the Democratic response.

item.title: Veterans sue over Trump’s planned 250-foot arch, citing cemetery views
item.description: The Vietnam War veterans, who later worked as U.S. diplomats, say that the arch would harm the experience of visiting nearby Arlington National Cemete...

item.title: Replacing Marjorie Taylor Greene puts Trump’s control of MAGA to the test
item.description: The president is accustomed to defining a race. But some voters in Georgia’s 14th District do not like being told what to do.
